title: State Department spokesperson on what Americans in the Middle East should do for evacuations
description: Some Americans in the Middle East are voicing frustration with what they say is a lack of help from the U.S. government as the State Department urges Americans to leave 14 countries in the region amid the Iran war. title: 2026 W’CUP: FIFA Silent On Nigeria’s Petition, Confirms DR Congo For Play-Offs
description: FIFA on Wednesday confirmed the final line-up for the inter-confederation play-off tournament, naming DR Congo as Africa’s representative and effectively ending Nigeria’s hopes of qualifying for the 2026 FIFA World Cup.
